library_preparation_preflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is required. The 2.2.1 artifact declares its runtime dependencies transitively, and the library is a Git CLI-backed Maven SCM provider rather than a service/client library needing a Dockerized backend or additional test dependency. The reported failure is due to API changes in existing tests, not missing setup.
risks: Tests that execute real provider commands will require a `git` executable on PATH; Ubuntu CI normally provides this, and it is not a Maven dependency or service container setup item.

Version 2.2.1 changed Git tag APIs: `GitTagCommand.createCommandLine` now takes a `CommandParameters.SignOption`, and `createPushCommandLine` is an instance method, so existing 2.1.0 tests must be adapted.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8354 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.2.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
